planSteps.description: Navigate to the KnowledgeWar homepage as a guest (not logged in)
Verify the 'Özellikler' (Features) link is visible in the main navigation
Verify the 'Giriş Yap' login button is visible in the header
Verify the 'Turnuvalar' nav link is NOT visible for guests
Verify the '⚔️ Turnuvalar' button is NOT visible in the header for guests
